# Virender Dhiman

> Automation/AI & Transformation Head — 15+ years bridging business operations and technology through ERP, CRM, workflow automation, AI agents, and data-driven transformation.

Virender Dhiman is a business & technology leader based in New Delhi 110070, India. He specializes in enterprise workflow automation, ERP/CRM optimization (Tally, SAP MM, Salesforce), MIS dashboards, Google Workspace administration, and AI/LLM integration for business processes. Lean Six Sigma Green Belt certified.

Contact: virender@virender.in | https://virender.in

## Core Expertise

- Workflow automation & process improvement (10+ days saved per cycle on gifting automation)
- ERP & CRM alignment (Salesforce + Tally ERP integration)
- MIS reporting, KPI dashboards (Power BI, Excel, Google Sheets)
- AI agents & LLM integrations in enterprise operations
- Agile/Scrum delivery, SOP development, digital transformation
